{{Infobox character
| name = Ryzer Raithe
| aliases = Ryzer
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| titles = diplomat of the Raithe family
| affiliations = Raithe family
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

''See also: [[Ryzer Raithe Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Ryzer Raithe is a prominent member of the [[Raithe family]] and serves as its primary diplomat. Physically, he is shorter and heavier than his brother, [[Raion]], with thinning white hair and a pale gold third eye. Unlike his brother, who is associated with the battlefield, Ryzer's role involves social interaction and storytelling. He resides in a luxurious villa on the planet [[Visiria]], located within a jungle-like environment of floating islands and oceanic plants. While he often attempts to maintain an easygoing demeanor, he has experienced significant internal struggle and nervousness, particularly regarding his family history and the fact that he previously expelled his brother from an airlock. Ryzer has been considered by authorities as a source of leverage due to his family's status, and he was ultimately spared by [[Varic]] at [[Raion]]'s request.}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Ryzer Raithe is the diplomat of the [[Raithe family]] and the brother of [[Raion]]. Residing in a luxurious villa on the edge of a sea on the planet [[Visiria]], he is characterized by his pale gold third eye and thinning white hair. During discussions regarding the possibility of war with [[Visiria]], Ryzer assisted [[Raion]] in securing an audience with [[Senator Cyclon]]. As an individual accompanying [[Raion]], Ryzer proves to be in his element while conducting meetings.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Ryzer Raithe]] is a shorter, softer version of his brother with thinning white hair and a pale gold third eye.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13">''The Knight'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Ryzer Raithe]]'s home is a luxurious villa on the edge of a sea on the planet [[Visiria]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c14">''The Knight'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The narrator spoke to Ryzer about being willing to go to war with [[Visiria]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Ryzer helped [[Raion]] get an audience with [[Senator Cyclon]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c17">''The Knight'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Ryzer Raithe]] is the diplomat of the [[Raithe family]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c25">''The Knight'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Ryzer Raithe]] is [[Raion]]'s brother.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Ryzer is an individual accompanying [[Raion]] who is in his element during meetings.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c26">''The Knight'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Ryzer Raithe]] is a person whom the [[Director]] of [[Planetary Security]] suggested taking into custody.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c27">''The Pilot'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“Senator Cyclon!” Raion announced. “Ryzer worked hard to get me an audience.”<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Raithe family]]
[[Category:Aliens]]
